title: Verify Trial Corner is NOT assigned to user who starts consumption within 5 minutes
description: Test that a new trial user who watches content within the first 5 minutes is NOT assigned to the Trial Corner cohort.
preconditions: User has just activated a ₹1 trial

steps.description: 1. Activate a new trial for a user.
2. Within 4 minutes, start playing any video content.

expected_result: The Trial Corner homepage widget is NOT visible. The standard trial experience is shown.
